source.business_scenario: 强制 Hash Join 大表驱动,explain 应包含 Broadcast/Redistribute
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT /*+ hashjoin(r c) */ COUNT(*)
FROM rental r, customer c
WHERE r.customer_id = c.customer_id
